title: run-state-v1
description: The FORMAL run-state contract (v1.0.17): the single machine-readable carrier for a run's BASE/INTEGRATION/FINAL SHAs, stored as UNTRACKED .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json (a commit cannot contain its own SHA, so tracked carriers are structurally impossible). Written ONLY by scripts/update_run_state.py, which derives every SHA from `git rev-parse HEAD` itself (callers can never supply one), enforces monotonic transitions (base_sha -> integration_sha -> final_sha; a set value never changes; an already-frozen final_sha can never be rewritten to another value), writes atomically, and validates the result against this schema. Keys are EXACTLY these lowercase names; SHAs are full 40-hex lowercase.

run_id.description: The room/flow run identifier (e.g. ftw-123, prl-7). Must match the file name: .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json.

base_sha.description: OPTIONAL. HEAD when the orchestrator committed the planning memory, derived by update_run_state.py via `git rev-parse HEAD` — builders fast-forward onto this before writing code.

integration_sha.description: OPTIONAL. HEAD of the single integration commit (integration/<run_id>), derived by update_run_state.py — review/QA/hardening seats verify against it.

final_sha.description: OPTIONAL until the freeze, then FROZEN. HEAD of the orchestrator's freeze commit, derived by update_run_state.py — the finalizer and gatekeeper verify HEAD equals it exactly, and update_run_state.py refuses to rewrite it to a different value.
